description_long: This object consists of three humanoid figures standing side by side, each with distinct body shapes and attire. The leftmost figure is tall and entirely black with exaggerated, abstract features, including elongated limbs and a head with protrusions, and white circular shapes on the chest. The central figure is more human-like, with a slender build, wearing a fitted dress and gloves, and has a high bun hairstyle. The rightmost figure is also human-like, with a slightly more muscular build, wearing a short dress and gloves, and sporting a spiked updo hairstyle. The figures appear to be stylized, with smooth surfaces and exaggerated proportions, suggesting a blend of realistic and fantastical design. The overall composition gives the impression of a group of pedestrians, possibly representing different characters or archetypes. The asset is visually striking due to the contrast in forms and the stylized, almost sculptural quality of the figures.
description: A group of three stylized humanoid figures, each with unique body shapes and attire, standing side by side in a visually striking arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three figures: a tall, abstract black figure on the left, a slender human-like figure in the center, and a muscular human-like figure on the right.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and profile of the figures, with the abstract black figure's elongated head and the human-like figures' postures and dress silhouettes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back details of the human-like figures' dresses and hairstyles, and the solid black back of the abstract figure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the profiles and relative heights of the figures, with the abstract figure's head shape and the human-like figures' stances.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted dress with gloves and stylized accessories
